MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. APPEARANCES: Albert M. Kun, Esq., for plaintiff; Harry T. Gower, Esq., for defendants Cross County Tran and Reardon; Robert Willoughby for Regents. Counsel report that the matter is settled, but will remain on the trial calendar pending a written agreement signed by the parties.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Appearances:
MARC N. ZIMMERMAN, Esq. of Hazzard Bonnington LLP, 415/288-9800, on behalf of defendant REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA and moving party.
ALBERT MIKLOS KUN, Esq., 415/362-4000, on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party.
